sourcesContent:
<!-- When showLoading = false, show Loading Component -->
<app-loading *ngIf="showLoading"></app-loading>

<!-- When showLoading = false, show all other Components -->
<main *ngIf="!showLoading">

  <app-navbar></app-navbar>  
    <!-- When showPopup = true, popup component is presented -->
    <app-popup *ngIf="showPopup"></app-popup>

    <
    <app-slide-out-panel *ngIf="showSlideOut"></app-slide-out-panel>

  <app-header></app-header>

  <app-primary-badges></app-primary-badges>

  <app-projects></app-projects>

  <app-secondary-badges></app-secondary-badges>
    
  <app-footer></app-footer>

</main>
